zh.lifeSummary: 當Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark於1192年出生在葡萄牙可布拉可布拉時，她的父親Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal38歲，母親Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort40歲。她於1214年與Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1221年3月27日在丹麥林斯泰德享年29歲，埋葬在丹麥林斯泰德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark于1192年出生在葡萄牙可布拉可布拉时，她的父亲Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal38岁，母亲Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort40岁。她于1214年与Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1221年3月27日在丹麦林斯泰德享年29岁，埋葬在丹麦林斯泰德。

nameMeanings.name: Sanches,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Manuel, Juan, Jesus, Luis, Pedro, Adolfo, Alina, Arturo, Domingos, Guillermo.  Portuguese Joao, Amadeu, Marcio.
Portuguese: patronymic from the personal name   Sancho  .
Spanish: variant or altered form of Sánchez (see Sanchez ).

variants.name: Sancho
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Elena, Carlos, Fernando, Jacinto, Mario, Agustin, Ana, Dulce, Emilio, Enrique, Eugenio.

Spanish and Portuguese: from Sancho, a popular medieval personal name, which is probably from Latin Sanc(t)ius, a derivative of sanctus ‘holy’. The personal name was borne by a 9th-century Christian martyr of Cordova.

en.lifeSummary: When Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark was born in 1192, in Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, her father, Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal, was 38 and her mother, Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort, was 40. She married Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen in 1214. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 27 March 1221, in Ringsted, Denmark, at the age of 29, and was buried in Ringsted, Denmark.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark est née en 1192, à Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, son père, Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen en 1214. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 mars 1221, à Ringsted, Danemark, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterrée à Ringsted, Danemark.

de.lifeSummary: Als Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark 1192 in Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal 38 und ihre Mutter Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort 40. Sie hat 1214 Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. März 1221 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Ringsted, Dänemark und wurde in Ringsted, Dänemark begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark è nata il nel 1192 nel Coimbra, Coimbra, Portogallo, sua padre, Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen nel 1214. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 27 marzo 1221, nel Ringsted, Danimarca, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolta a Ringsted, Danimarca.

ja.lifeSummary: Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmarkが1192年にポルトガルコインブラコインブラで生まれた時，父Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugalは38歳，母Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consortは40歳であった。1214年にValdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1221年3月27日にデンマークリングステドで29歳で死去し，デンマークリングステドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark(이)가 1192년 포르투갈 코임브라 코임브라에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1214년 Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1221년 3월 27일 덴마크 링스테드에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 덴마크 링스테드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark nasceu em 1192, em Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, seu pai, Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen em 1214. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de março de 1221, em Ringsted, Dinamarca, com 29 anos, e foi sepultada em Ringsted, Dinamarca.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark родилась в 1192 г. в местности коимбра, коимбра, Португалия, её отцу по имени Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen в 1214 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 27 марта 1221 г. в местности рингстед, Дания в возрасте 29 лет и была похоронена в местности рингстед, Дания.

sm.from 1214 to 1221: mai le 1214 e o'o I le 1221

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark nació en 1192, en Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, su papá, Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen en 1214. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 27 de marzo de 1221, en Ringsted, Dinamarca, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultada en Ringsted, Dinamarca.
